data.title: Remediate shim violations in skills and prompts
data.description: Fix violations in plugins/dso/skills/. Host-facing scripts (ticket, validate, ci-status, merge-to-main) → replace with shim. Internal scripts (agent-batch-lifecycle, sprint-next-batch, analyze-file-impact) → annotate # shim-exempt: internal orchestration script. tested-by-linter: check-shim-refs.sh.
